text: Information about melee attacks are located in `/Data/Melee/attacks.json`.
Performs melee attack check and returns a table of raycast results.
params: The uuid of the melee attack.
The source position of the attack.
The direction and reach of the attack.
The unit that is the source of the attack.

deprecated: Name is deprecated, use uuid instead
params: The name of the melee attack.
The damage the attack will inflict.
The source position of the attack.
The direction and reach of the attack.
The player that is the source of the attack.
The number of ticks before performing the attack. (Defaults to 0)
The strength of the knockback power. (Defaults to 5000)
A table of characters to ignore in the attack. (optional)
